description: End-to-end gate for the open-vocab rebuild (WP-I) + rich rule DECODE + WP-0 council scoping. 'expected' is the plan's acceptance target; 'recorded' is the real verification result on prod; 'gaps' documents the honest shortfalls against the target.
address_note: Proxy for '3 BLACK SWAN RISE BEELIAR' which is missing from G-NAF.

recorded.method: LIVE auto-resolution: the standard AddressResolutionService resolved '1 BLACK SWAN RISE BEELIAR' to cadastre parcel 1585770 and synthesised confirmed spatial facts. Unblocked by (a) operator open-data approval of the Landgate/DPLH SLIP datasets (audit_events: dataset_approval) and (b) a uuid-cast fix in planning_for_parcel (the parcel->planning-feature R-code/zone join previously crashed once the parcel gate opened).

advisory_samples.what_it_means: Aboriginal persons may enter upon any unenclosed and unimproved parts of the land under a diversification lease to seek their sustenance.
advisory_samples.how_to_query: Check if the land is unenclosed and unimproved for Aboriginal access.

advisory_samples.what_it_means: Above-ground, exposed water and gas supply pipes must be made of metal.
advisory_samples.how_to_query: Check if the material of above-ground, exposed water and gas supply pipes is metal.

advisory_samples.what_it_means: Abuttals must be used in addition to dimensions unless specifically authorized otherwise.
advisory_samples.how_to_query: Check if abuttals are used in addition to dimensions unless there is special authorization.

recorded.decode_library: 1723 approved development rules (Cockburn + WA state planning docs), each cited and decoded into what_it_is / what_it_means / how_to_query. Refined from an initial 7264 gpt-4o-mini decode through: a faithfulness+relevance gate (removed wrong-region/non-planning + clearly-unfaithful), a gpt-4o CORRECTION pass (rewrote each meaning to match its cited quote — fixing should/may-vs-must modality, invented thresholds, reversals — and recovered the gate's false-rejects), a real-rule filter (dropped faithful-but-not-checkable admin/process/objective content), and a noise sweep (out-of-scope sector acts, Commonwealth cross-refs, broken quotes). Independent 3-judge audits: faithfulness 1.00 (73/73) on the final set. The engine surfaces up to 80 applicable non-numeric rules per run, ranked by proposal relevance.

faithfulness_audit.note: cite-or-refuse correctness: every sampled rule faithfully represents its cited source

gaps: pass_or_fail (2) < target 10: synth provides LOT MEASUREMENTS (area/width/depth). site_area and min_frontage now auto-evaluate from them; setbacks, heights, garage, plot ratio etc. require PROPOSED design values from a drawing upload and correctly return needs_more_info. The >=10 target is unreachable from spatial synth alone — it needs a proposal/drawing.
resolved_since_last_run: Dataset governance: the Landgate cadastre (lgate-001/233) and DPLH planning (dplh-070/071) + heritage (dplh-006/008/090) datasets were operator-approved as OPEN DATA (verified_open/approved) on 2026-06-15, recorded in audit_events. LIVE auto-resolution now runs the same synth proven here.
planning_for_parcel uuid=varchar crash fixed (CAST to uuid).
site_area now auto-evaluates from lot area (WP-E operator curation).
WP-0: LGA resolved by polygon containment against lg_areas and canonicalised to 'City of Cockburn'; engine now reads fact_type='local_government' for council_scope.
